# Yetty 3rd-party prebuilt binaries
#
# Format: name|type|url_or_owner/repo|version_or_rev
#
# Tarball published at:
#   https://github.com/zokrezyl/yetty/releases/download/3rdparty-<X.Y.Z>/<name>-<target>-<X.Y.Z>.tar.gz
#
# Source of truth for the *prebuilt-tarball* version of each library.
# The upstream source pin is also mirrored in build-tools/nix/versions.txt
# (used by the alt nix-CPM-from-source path); both must agree on the tag.

openh264|github|cisco/openh264|v2.4.1
